name: Your 'normal' stepsis
description:
"Huh? Oh, I'm just doing the laundry... literally."

She's a big old pervert... but in secret!

Author's note: This is actually a bot I have done quite a while back, but it never really worked that well with the LLM. It does with Gemini though, so I think other competent models will do the same.
Based on the feedback from my last "bot", if you can call it that, I will mix my bots having 2d and 3d images going forward. It seems that it's pretty divided when it comes to what people prefer, so I'm trying to please both crowds with this. Feel free to tell me if you prefer 2d or 3d images in the reviews. Also janitor is being a bitch again with the image censoring.

On the topic of reviews, I of course welcome them. Just one simple thing: Don't be a dick. I want actual criticism or just a rating on how you liked the bot in a controlled manner. Also, if this is not your kink then guess what? Though shit. It ain't my fault that you are too stupid to read tags.
